title: The French people's vote is still up for grabs
subhed: The clear and decisive municipal election results in most cities show that the 2027 presidential election is far from a foregone conclusion. While distrust and the democratic malaise are very real, voters are not indifferent to the growth of the radical left and the far right's possible rise to power.

title: Mette Frederiksen heads into Danish elections as a global figure, but a divisive one domestically
subhed: The leader of the Social Democrats, in power since 2019, seeks reelection on Tuesday. While her support for Ukraine and her firm stance against Donald Trump regarding Greenland have earned her recognition on the European stage, her party has been struggling in the polls.

title: French municipal elections: Full results in every city, town and village
subhed: French voters elected more than 34,000 mayors on March 15 and 22. Use our search engine to find the winner in any municipality.

title: Paris municipal elections: Emmanuel Grégoire and the united left achieve a resounding victory
subhed: Despite a united front from the entire right-wing and centrist parties – as well as competition on the left with La France Insoumise candidate Sophia Chikirou remaining in the race – the Socialist candidate delivered the united left its most impressive victory in Paris since 2001.

title: Is anti-scooter sentiment fueled by class contempt?
subhed: Electric scooters are booming in popularity, but local officials are increasingly moving to restrict or ban them. The backlash raises a broader question: Are scooters the future of urban transport or a growing urban irritant?
